text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
<chrname>'s race is drawing near. I'm
sure we've done enough running in preparation,
but I can't quite shake off my anxieties...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I fret about whether our training has been
enough to win, a certain racer happens by...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That's quite a stern look on your face. Is
something the matter?
choice_data_list: I'm just feeling nervous, that's all...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Haha. I can deeply relate to that state of mind.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
However, it would be best not to display your
unease so freely, lest it make your trainee anxious
as well.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If you ask me, you two should have confidence in
yourselves. The number and quality of your runs
are second to none.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Good results will surely follow, so be calm in your
heart and rest assured. Of course, I suppose this is
much easier said than done.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
There must be more I can do to reassure you...
Ah, I have just the idea. Tell me how you are
preparing for your race.
choice_data_list: We're focusing on moderate speed training.

We're training hard to prepare for the worst
case scenario.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Focusing on speed while preserving energy... I
see. Yes, I expected as much. That's an orthodox
and logical approach.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The path you have chosen is well-traveled, which,
I suppose, is precisely why you feel so uneasy.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But worry not. Staying on that path will
undoubtedly lead to glory.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I believe you two have the strength to follow the
road you've chosen. There is no need to doubt
yourselves.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf's words ease my anxieties a little,
and I feel confidence welling up within me once
more.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hm, I see. So you're allaying those fears of yours
by training intensely and preparing for any and all
possibilities.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Though it may not be the most orthodox
approach, I can see how it might be the best one
for your current situation.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Once you lose yourself to the thrill of the run, all
your fears, doubts, and apprehensions will be left
behind in the dust like forgotten sighs.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I believe you have made the right choice. Go
forth and guide your racer with confidence.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf's words ease my anxieties a little,
and I feel confidence welling up within me once
more.
